title: AI Weather Quest 2025
one_liner: ECMWF's global sub-seasonal forecasting competition (days 19–32, 1.5° resolution, probabilistic).
problem: Sub-seasonal forecasting (days 19–32) is the 'predictability desert' between weather and climate. Can data-driven post-processing make ECMWF's ensemble skillful and calibrated?
approach: Designed a geo-aware 3D U-Net and integrated the van Leeuwen et al. (2025) 4-source Bayesian uncertainty framework, turning deterministic post-processing into calibrated quintile-probability forecasts.
why_it_matters: Led a 4-person team submitting weekly forecasts across the competition periods; accepted for presentation at S2S2D 2026 (Reading, UK).
